summary: The Goshen Township Board of Trustees reconvened and discussed multiple items including a dump truck bed replacement, hiring a new firefighter paramedic, local government fund apportionment, scheduling a zoning workshop, reallocating ARP funds for hiring a zoning attorney, and a drone purchase presentation for use by fire, police, service, and zoning departments. The meeting concluded with an executive session regarding public employee matters.
decisions: Motion to hire John Grooms as probationary full-time firefighter paramedic effective June 19, 2022 – passed
Motion to approve Resolution R0292022 authorizing alternative apportionment of the undivided local government fund for 2023-2027 – passed
Motion to set special joint meeting of Board of Trustees, Zoning Commission, and Board of Zoning Appeals for June 27, 2022 at 6:30 PM for zoning workshop – passed
Motion to reallocate $50,000 from ARP funds for hiring of zoning attorney – passed
Motion to approve and authorize Township Administrator to sign engagement letter retaining Ben Yoder and Bricker and Eckler as special counsel for zoning – passed
Motion to reallocate $15,000 from ARP funds for drone purchase – passed
Dump truck bed replacement tabled to June 24 agenda
Motion to adjourn into executive session at 8:09 PM per ORC 121.22G1 – passed
action_items: Director Meadows to continue researching dump truck bed replacement options and used truck availability for June 24 meeting
Director Holberg to investigate case law on admissibility of drone surveillance evidence for zoning enforcement purposes
Township Administrator to sign engagement letter with Ben Yoder / Bricker and Eckler for zoning legal counsel
Chief Myers to proceed with drone acquisition under $9,000 budget
John Grooms to begin as probationary full-time firefighter paramedic on June 19, 2022
key_amounts: $24,905 – W.A. Jones bid for steel dump truck bed replacement with LEDs, hydraulic lines, lift hoists, and installation
$25,000 – increase appropriation in gas tax fund line item
$12,000 – total spent on truck repairs over last two years
$50,000 – ARP reallocation for hiring zoning attorney
Under $9,000 – updated drone purchase quote (down from initial $12,000)
$12,000 – estimated cost to install plow with hydraulics on a used truck
notable_topics: Dump truck bed replacement options and used truck alternatives
Hiring of probationary firefighter paramedic John Grooms
Local government fund apportionment resolution for 2023-2027
Special joint zoning workshop meeting scheduled for June 27, 2022
Hiring of Bricker and Eckler as special zoning counsel
Drone acquisition presentation for multi-department use (fire, police, service, zoning)
Legal concerns about drone use for zoning enforcement and admissibility of evidence
Executive session for employee compensation/appointment matters
notes: Transcript contains significant OCR/auto-caption artifacts and repeated headers. Part 1 of meeting. The dump truck bed discussion was tabled to the June 24 agenda without a vote. There was notable trustee concern about Fourth Amendment and privacy implications of using drones for zoning inspections, with a request to research case law on admissibility. The drone presentation included video demonstrations from station locations.
title: BOT MTG 6.14.22 Part 1
